title: Simple HP
description: This resource pack changes the look of Armor HUD bar, the hunger bar and health bar by making them into squares.
body:
This resource pack changes the look of Armor HUD bar, the hunger bar and health bar by making them into squares. ![Here is an image of what the HUD looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28fd79212d5880a026cffbda9075d20e37f0391b.png) 

!!IMPORTANT!! 
This resource pack will often say that it is incompatiable or broken. It will normally work anyway.
